meta.title: MergeCore Vue Rules
meta.description: Rules for Vue 3 single-file components and Composition API: reactivity, templates, props/emits, and lifecycle.
meta.notes: Gate with vue: true. Rules assume Vue 3; confirm before applying to legacy Vue 2 code.

scoring.normalisation: Per review unit (one .vue SFC or one composable), sum penalties after optional quality_signal multiplier, then score = max(0, min(10, initial_score - min(sum_penalties, max_total_penalty_per_file))).

interpretation.9_to_10: Reactive sources are stable, templates safe, props typed, emits declared.
interpretation.7_to_8: Mergeable; tighten watchers or split the SFC.
interpretation.5_to_6: Risky: mutated props, reactivity loss, or v-for without key.
interpretation.0_to_4: Block: v-html from user input or broken component contracts.

rules.title: v-html rendering user-controlled content
rules.description: v-html bypasses Vue's automatic escaping. Rendering user or remote HTML without sanitisation enables XSS.

rules.title: Destructuring reactive objects loses reactivity
rules.description: Destructuring props, reactive(), or a store breaks the reactive link. Use toRefs, computed, or keep property access.

rules.title: v-for without :key or with non-stable key
rules.description: Lists without a stable :key cause reorder bugs and lost focus. Use a domain id; avoid using the loop index as key when items mutate.

rules.title: Prop mutated inside child component
rules.description: Mutating props breaks the one-way data flow. Emit an event or use a local ref seeded from the prop with defineModel when appropriate.

rules.title: Side effect without cleanup on unmount
rules.description: Timers, listeners, and observers started in setup must be cleaned up in onBeforeUnmount (or via watchEffect's onCleanup).

rules.title: Large composable with unrelated responsibilities
rules.description: A composable returning many unrelated refs and functions is hard to test. Split by responsibility (data, UI state, transport).

rules.title: Emits not declared with defineEmits
rules.description: Declaring emits gives a typed contract and enables validation. Ad-hoc emits lead to silent mismatches.

rules.title: watch with deep: true on large reactive tree
rules.description: Deep watching expensive structures degrades performance. Watch a computed projection, or use an explicit source.

rules.title: Complex expression in template
rules.description: Long conditionals or transforms in templates are hard to test. Move to computed properties or methods.

rules.title: Click handler on non-interactive element
rules.description: @click on div/span without role, tabindex, or keyboard handlers excludes keyboard and assistive technology users.

rules.title: Strong pattern: typed defineProps with validators
rules.description: Using defineProps<Props>() or a runtime schema with validators surfaces contract bugs at the boundary.

rules.title: Global store for local-only state
rules.description: Pinia/Vuex stores shared across the app for state that belongs to one view invite coupling. Keep local state in the component.

heuristics: Store consumed by a single component
